name: tool shed
hints: Three useful tools here. Take what you need.
The shovel is essential for digging up buried treasure. The hammer has uses too. Water wings help in water.
GET SHOVEL (critical for treasure hunting on Treasure Island). GET HAMMER for nails/boards. GET WINGS for swimming safely.
GET SHOVEL is most important - needed to DIG on Treasure Island. The hammer and water wings have situational uses. NORTH returns to the cavern.
notes: Tool shed inside the underground cavern. Contains the essential shovel (for digging treasure), claw hammer, and water wings. NORTH returns to the large cavern (room 17).
